description:
24 PCS Flower Diamond Butterfly Nail Art, Long Length Long Water Pipe Fake Nails,Square Head Nail Tips False Nail
1.Nails press on has 24 pieces of nails of different sizes/12 sets, a finger size that is suitable for most people
2.SIMPLE OPERATION - Just clean your nails, then choose the right nail size, stick the double-sided tape on the nails and press for a while, you will have nail salon-like nails in just a few easy steps.For a longer lasting effect, you can use glue (the effect lasts about a week).
3.HIGH QUALITY - stick on nails are made of high quality ABS material, non-toxic, no odor, no harm to your nails or body, durable and not easy to fade.Provide you with a wonderful manicure experience.
4.WIDE APPLICATIONS - Press on nails are suitable for all social occasions, perfect for nail salons, DIY home nail art. Great for weddings, proms, dates, but also for Valentine's Day, Halloween, Christmas and other holidays. The perfect gift for partners, family, friends.
